title: The Coal Mines Provident Fund and Miscellaneous Provisions Act, 1948
full_text: The Coal Mines Provident Fund and Miscellaneous Provisions Act, 1948 कोयला खान भविष्य-निधि और प्रकीर्ण उपबंधअधिनियम, 1948 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 194846 Act Number: 46 Enactment Date: 1948-09-03 Act Year: 1948 Short Title: The Coal Mines Provident Fund and Miscellaneous Provisions Act, 1948 Hindi Title: कोयला खान भविष्य-निधि और प्रकीर्ण उपबंधअधिनियम, 1948 Long Title: An Act to make provisions for the framing of a Provident Fund Scheme, a Pension Scheme, a Deposit linked Insurance Scheme and a Bonus Scheme for persons employed in Coal Mines.
